steps.prompt: Find me a top-rated vegan restaurant in Tokyo.
steps.response: Live POI search returned mock results, so here are four top-rated vegan spots in Tokyo I recommend. Want me to pull live hours or make a booking?
attractions_found: T's Tantan — Famous vegan ramen counter at Tokyo Station (and other spots) serving rich, creamy plant-based bowls loved by locals and travelers.
Ain Soph. Journey (Shinjuku) — Upscale, cozy vegan spot known for creative multi-course meals and legendary fluffy pancakes.
Saido (Jiyugaoka) — Refined vegan Japanese cuisine with kaiseki-style touches and beautiful plating; a local favorite for special meals.
Nagi Shokudo (Shibuya) — Laid-back, homestyle vegan cafe offering Japanese-Western fusion dishes and rotating daily specials at wallet-friendly prices.
